name: maestro-login-flow
prompt: 로그인 플로우를 Maestro로 자동화해줘. appId는 com.example.app이고 이메일/비밀번호 입력 후 Submit

assertions.text: Agent runs dependency verification (xcrun simctl help and maestro --version) before any command
Agent creates a Maestro flow file following the {feature}-{action}.yaml pattern (e.g., login-submit.yaml) in the maestro/ directory
The generated Maestro YAML includes appId: com.example.app
The flow includes tapOn, inputText steps for email and password fields, and a Submit tap action
The flow includes an assertVisible step to verify successful login
The Maestro flow file does not contain hardcoded absolute file paths
Agent reads the flow file to check for structural errors before attempting maestro test
Agent outputs a Simulator Session Report with Maestro Flow Results section
